name: Sanjay Raut
quote: Where is Anna Hazare sitting? Anna Hazare had undertaken an 11-day hunger strike there in 2012, and all of us had gone there. Representatives from the government had come as well. Vilasrao Deshmukh was leading the talks. Now, it is also Anna Hazare's responsibility, isn't it, to go to Delhi and support Sonam Wangchuk. This is also a responsibility of Anna Hazare.
